articles.title: 14 Stocks on Jim Cramer’s Radar
articles.summary: This article lists stocks on Jim Cramer's watch, focusing on International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF). Cramer believes IFF has turned around, noting its 22% year-to-date increase, although he previously criticized its flatlining sales and lack of growth. The article also mentions various other companies like NVIDIA, Starbucks, and Nike.
